title: Superflat Structures
description: Lets all structures (biome dependent) generate in all superflat presets!
body:
# Superflat Structures

This mod allows any structure to generate in any super flat preset, structures are still limited by other spawn conditions such as biome, and mineshafts needing to be underground.\
\
Note this mod also makes trial chambers spawn less often as when generating above ground as in most super flat presets they were cluttering the sky, but this will also apply to non super flat worlds, this mod is mostly meant for pack makers making super flat expriences
